startPoint.en: Talk to Jorral in the outpost south of the Tree Gnome Stronghold, north-west of West Ardougne.
startPoint.es: Habla con Jorral en el puesto avanzado al sur de Tree Gnome Stronghold, al noroeste de West Ardougne.

items.name: Spade
items.display: Spade (or the meerkats familiar; the spade can be purchased from Richard's Farming Shop during the quest)

items.name: Ecto-token
items.display: 2 ecto-tokens (or completion of Ghosts Ahoy), or 2,600 coins (1,300 coins after Cabin Fever) to charter ships from Port Sarim to Port Phasmatys

items.name: Ghostspeak amulet
items.display: A ghostspeak amulet or cramulet (not required if you have completed the hard Morytania achievements)

rewards.name: Enchanted key (Making History)
rewards.display: The enchanted key, allowing you to go on your own treasure digs until it disappears; see the enchanted key lore activity

rewards.name: Outpost
rewards.display: Access to the museum in the Outpost

rewards.name: You can read an incomplete list of all your exploits during the quest on the bookcase at the Outpost, but cannot take it away.
rewards.display: You can read an incomplete list of all your exploits during the quest on the bookcase at the Outpost, but cannot take it away.

rewards.name: Master quest cape
rewards.display: You can return to Droalak in Port Phasmatys after the quest and upon learning of what happened, he will finally be at peace and will disappear. Doing so is a requirement for obtaining the master quest cape.
You can talk to Historian Minas in the Varrock Museum to receive 5 Kudos and an antique lamp that gives 1,000 experience in a skill of level 20 or above.

text.en: Go to the Outpost; an old, now-derelict tower to the north of West Ardougne.
text.es: Ve al Outpost, una torre antigua y ahora en ruinas al norte de West Ardougne.

text.en: Traveller's necklace teleports directly to the Outpost.
text.es: El Traveller's necklace teletransporta directamente al Outpost.

text.en: Eagles' Peak lodestone and run south, then south east.
text.es: Piedra de viaje de Eagles' Peak y corre al sur, luego al sureste.

text.en: Speak with Jorral for a cutscene. (opciones de chat: 1 Tell me more.)
text.es: Habla con Jorral para ver una escena. (opciones de chat: 1 Tell me more.)

text.en: After the cutscene, agree to help. (opciones de chat: Accept)
text.es: Después de la escena, acepta ayudar. (opciones de chat: Accept)

text.en: Talk to the silver merchant in the East Ardougne marketplace. (opciones de chat: 3 Ask about the outpost.)
text.es: Habla con el mercader de plata en el mercado de East Ardougne. (opciones de chat: 3 Ask about the outpost.)

text.en: Do not steal from the stall otherwise the merchant will not talk with you.
text.es: No robes del puesto o el mercader no querrá hablar contigo.

text.en: Ring of dueling to Castle Wars, run north and cross the bridge south of the Observatory.
text.es: Ring of dueling hasta Castle Wars, corre al norte y cruza el puente al sur del Observatory.

text.en: West of fairy ring and north-west of Yanille lodestone.
text.es: Al oeste del fairy ring y al noroeste de la piedra de viaje de Yanille.

text.en: When you're just north of the bridge, play hot-and-cold by feeling the key and walking around until it feels steaming hot, and use the spade to dig. (Between the two trees)
text.es: Cuando estés justo al norte del puente, juega a frío-caliente sintiendo la llave y caminando alrededor hasta que se sienta ardiendo, y usa la pala para cavar. (Entre los dos árboles)

text.en: Use the key on the chest to unlock it.
text.es: Usa la llave en el cofre para abrirlo.

text.en: Speak to Droalak south of the General Store in Port Phasmatys.
text.es: Habla con Droalak al sur del General Store en Port Phasmatys.

text.en: Ectophial or Port Sarim lodestone and charter ship to Port Phasmatys.
text.es: Ectophial o piedra de viaje de Port Sarim y barco fletado hasta Port Phasmatys.

text.en: Wear the ghostspeak amulet.
text.es: Equípate el ghostspeak amulet.

text.en: Talk to Melina in the building east of the General Store with a sapphire amulet in your inventory.
text.es: Habla con Melina en el edificio al este del General Store con un sapphire amulet en tu inventario.

text.en: Talk to Droalak again for the scroll.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con Droalak para conseguir el pergamino.

text.en: Talk to Blanin, west of the cow pen in Rellekka.
text.es: Habla con Blanin, al oeste del corral de vacas en Rellekka.

text.en: Talk to Dron, west of the helmet shop. (opciones de chat: 3 I'm after important answers. • 2 Why you're the famous warrior Dron!)
text.es: Habla con Dron, al oeste de la tienda de cascos. (opciones de chat: 3 I'm after important answers. • 2 Why you're the famous warrior Dron!)

text.en: Answer his quiz. (opciones de chat: 2 An iron mace. • 1 Breakfast. • 2 Lunch. • 1 Bunnies. • 2 Red. • 2 36. • 1 8. • 3 Fifth and Fourth. • 3 Northeast side of town. • 1 Blanin. • 1 Fluffy. • 1 12, but what does that have to do with anything?)
text.es: Responde a su cuestionario. (opciones de chat: 2 An iron mace. • 1 Breakfast. • 2 Lunch. • 1 Bunnies. • 2 Red. • 2 36. • 1 8. • 3 Fifth and Fourth. • 3 Northeast side of town. • 1 Blanin. • 1 Fluffy. • 1 12, but what does that have to do with anything?)

text.en: Return to Jorral at the outpost, talk to him until he gives you a Letter.
text.es: Vuelve con Jorral en el Outpost y habla con él hasta que te dé una Letter.

text.en: Talk to King Lathas on the of Ardougne Castle. (Remove Mourner Outfit if equipped)
text.es: Habla con King Lathas en el Ardougne Castle. (Quítate el Mourner Outfit si lo llevas puesto)

text.en: Return to Jorral.
text.es: Vuelve con Jorral.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
